summary: Iter 18 WhatsApp-Web Inbox tested end-to-end. Backend 11/11 pytest passing (conversations list w/ unread_count+last_direction+last_status+last_media_type, search q, unread_only filter, mark-read clears unread, assign RBAC + 404 for non-tenant agent + unassign + agent-role blocked, internal notes create+timeline visibility+empty rejection, timeline ASC order + pagination cursor + backward-compat no-params). Frontend Inbox page loads with 17 conversations, all data-testids present (conv-search, filter-unread, conv-item-*, unread-*, chat-messages, msg-*, open-profile, compose-*, toggle-internal-note, back-to-list). Internal note flow works: toggling turns Send button yellow, sending posts note, note appears centered with yellow bubble and 'Internal note · author' label. Mobile responsive (<768px) hides list when chat open, back-to-list button returns to list. Load-older button not tested end-to-end because active contact had <100 messages (no has_more), but backend pagination verified via pytest.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py timeline: next_cursor uses msgs[-1] after list-reversed source (msgs sorted DESC then reversed for return). Cursor value is created_at of oldest returned message — correct for 'before' subsequent call. Confirmed via pagination test.

Inbox.jsx: variable name collision — outer state `isNote` and per-message local `const isNote = m.direction === 'internal'...` inside map. Works due to block scoping but is a readability smell; rename inner to `isInternalMsg`.
Inbox.jsx MediaBubble useEffect cleanup references `url` from closure — may not revoke latest blob URL correctly across re-renders (minor memory leak). Consider useRef pattern.

Realtime dispatcher relies on window custom event 'cpaas:new_message' — not verified in this pass since WS was not simulated; existing WS integration in AppLayout must dispatch this event for realtime append to work.
seed_data_creation: 3 internal notes added to contact +919888812345 during testing (TEST_note_* — safe to leave).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 Inbox is solid. Next-session P1 (reactions/forward) not implemented yet. Realtime cpaas:new_message dispatch from WebSocket wasn't functionally tested (WS handshake fails in preview env — pre-existing warning, non-blocking). If next session tests realtime, verify AppLayout WS handler emits the custom event.
